creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like upstream has renamed the project: xapps -> xapp. Also, current version is out of date according to Repology.

$ make checksum TRYBROKEN= MASTER_SITE_BACKUP= DISTDIR=$(mktemp -dt distfiles)
===>  License LGPL3 accepted by the user
===>   xapps-1.6.10_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> linuxmint-xapps-1.6.10_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /tmp/distfiles.gKboeEwR/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/linuxmint/xapps/tar.gz/1.6.10?dummy=/linuxmint-xapps-1.6.10_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/linuxmint/xapps/tar.gz/1.6.10?dummy=/linuxmint-xapps-1.6.10_GH0.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/linuxmint/xapps/tar.gz/1.6.10?dummy=/linuxmint-xapps-1.6.10_GH0.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
linuxmint-xapps-1.6.10_GH0.tar.gz                      154 kB 1067 kBps    00s
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 158446, actual 158420)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /tmp/distfiles.gKboeEwR/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
